node.statement: ARITHMETIC ABSORPTION eta <= sqrt(eta), hence a single eps=C sqrt(eta). Claim: for eta in [0,eta_0] with eta_0<=1, eta <= sqrt(eta). Proof: if eta=0 both sides are 0. If 0<eta<=1 then eta^2 <= eta (multiply 0<eta<=1 by eta>0: eta*eta <= eta*1), and taking nonnegative square roots (sqrt monotone on [0,infty)) gives eta = sqrt(eta^2) <= sqrt(eta). Consequence: the O(eta) defects from nodes 1.3 (C_1 eta), 1.4 (C_2 eta), 1.5 (C_3 eta) satisfy C_i eta <= C_i sqrt(eta) (i=1,2,3); the O(sqrt(eta)) defect from node 1.6 is C_4 sqrt(eta). Set C:=max(C_1,C_2,C_3,C_4) (finite, universal). Then ALL FOUR def-eps-jb-algebra axioms (JB1-JB4) hold with a common defect eps := C sqrt(eta): JB1 (1+C_1 eta)<=(1+C sqrt(eta)), JB2 (1-C_2 eta)>=(1-C sqrt(eta)), JB3 -C_3 eta>=-C sqrt(eta) (since C_3 eta<=C sqrt(eta)), JB4 C_4 sqrt(eta)<=C sqrt(eta). Therefore eps <= C sqrt(eta). (Requires eta_0<=1; combined with the eta_0<1/4 of GT-Pprops, take eta_0=1/4.)
